A

addAlbum(String) - Method in class model.User
Creates and adds a new album with the name given, if an album with that name doesn't already exist.
addPhoto(Photo) - Method in class model.Album
Adds the photo to the album, if it is not already there
addTag(Tag) - Method in class model.Photo
Adds a tag to the photo, if it does not already exist.
AdminController - Class in controller
Controller for the Admin screen.
AdminController() - Constructor for class controller.AdminController
 
Album - Class in model
Represents an album belonging to a user.
Album(String) - Constructor for class model.Album
Creates a new album with the specified name
Albums - Class in controller
The controller for the Albums screen.
Albums() - Constructor for class controller.Albums
 
AlbumView - Class in controller
Controller for the AlbumView screen.
AlbumView() - Constructor for class controller.AlbumView
 
app - package app
